description: Costa Rica cultural foreign trade — exports and imports of 4 cultural sectors (Editorial, Publicidad, Audiovisual, Música), 2010–2024, in millions of colones (CRC). USD column ETL-derived.
source: Cuenta Satélite de Cultura de Costa Rica (CSCCR) — CICSC (MCJ + BCCR + INEC + PEN + CONARE); data hosted by the Banco Central de Costa Rica
licence: open data — Costa Rican official statistics (BCCR / MCJ)
currency: CRC million (value_crc_million); USD million is derived, see fx_crc_usd_annual
coverage_break: Full 4-sector coverage 2010–2021 only; 2022–2024 is Editorial-only (other sectors n.d.) and the year totals collapse to Editorial. See full_sector_coverage.
